entity.name: Akos Foldesi
entity.description: Creator and sole maintainer of OpenEUDI, the open-source EUDI Wallet verification toolkit for TypeScript.

projects.name: @openeudi/core
projects.description: Framework-agnostic EUDI Wallet verification protocol engine. Session management, pluggable storage, strategy-pattern operating modes, EventEmitter architecture. The foundational library for EU digital identity verification in JavaScript and TypeScript.

projects.name: @openeudi/openid4vp
projects.description: OpenID4VP credential parsing and validation for EUDI Wallets. Supports SD-JWT VC and mDOC/mDL credential formats with certificate trust verification, nonce validation, and privacy-preserving claim extraction.

plans.name: SDK Maintenance and Security
plans.description: Ongoing maintenance of the OpenEUDI verification toolkit including OpenID4VP spec tracking, security patches, dependency updates, EU Trusted List synchronization, and community issue triage.

plans.name: Ecosystem Development
plans.description: Build e-commerce plugins for WooCommerce and Shopify, EU Trusted List certificate chain validation, 27-country compliance mapping, reference verification server, and developer documentation.
